normalized_text:
Purpose
This procedure describes the minimum information needed to create a reportable safety case.

Minimum information
- identifiable reporter
- identifiable patient
- suspect product
- adverse event description

Seriousness indicators
- hospitalization
- life-threatening event
- death
- disability or incapacity
- other medically significant event

Agent instructions
Agents must not provide diagnosis or treatment direction. Agents should collect minimum information and escalate according to safety policy.
